Clarity  

Description

2: Increase Mana by 1 (L26) to 10 (L33) per tick

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 75 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3.1 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 200
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: A cool breeze slips through your mind.
Cast on other: Soandso looks tranquil.
Effect Fades: The cool breeze fades.

Game Description

Calms your target's thoughts, allowing them to regenerate mana more quickly.

Items with this effect

  • Beguiler's Trousers
  • Bone Collar of the Possessed
  • Clarifying Spores
  • Coin Depicting Innoruuk
  • Dazzling Trousers
  • Illusionist's Pantaloons
  • Potion of Insight
  • Resplendent Trousers
  • Rod of Infinite Thought
  • Rod of Unbound Thought
  • Spell: Clarity

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Clarity
ClassLevel
ENC26
Expansion:

Duration:
27.0 mins
  • Comments (11)
  • Sold By (10)
  • Screenshots
Add Image
Post Comment
On Posts
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2005 at 8:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591863751171
877 posts
To answer some questions from previous posts:

Yes, Breeze was better than Clarity in the early levels.. it seems they've fixed this, but I'm not sure.

C3 (KEI), like all 50+ buffs, has a level restriction of 45+ on it, some higher, depending on the level of the buff. HOWEVER- There was a loophole. If it was a group buff, and a 44- was not targetted, then it'd affect anyone in the group, regardless of level. This has since been fixed.
▲ Page top
Something to keep in mind:
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2005 at 3:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591848446205
4 posts
My chanter friend and I tested this last night to confirm. At the level you recieve clarity (26), it is actually weaker than Breeze. You lose 2 manaregen/tick with Clarity on. I can only assume this is due to the recent every level spell changes.

Breeze:
2: Increase Mana by 4 (L14) to 6 (L20) per tick

Clarity:
2: Increase Mana by 4 (L26) to 9 (L64) per tick

Fun!

Edited, Wed Jul 20 04:38:47 2005
▲ Page top

Anyone know the minimum target levels for the clarity line? Have checked raw data and Lucy (from which Raw data seems to be derived) and can't figure it out.

Useful information now that KEI level restrictions are enforced.

__DEL__1591786730841

Clarity cannot be cast on just any level character. Low levels get Breeze or are you referring to Breeze as Clarity?

# Jun 13 2003 at 3:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591788592110

im not exactly sure but you are right the restriction is too high!!

Yanamyan Theimpossible
high elf enchanter The Namless Serever
▲ Page top
RE: Minimum Target Levels
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2003 at 2:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251709006
145 posts
Restrictions are NOT to high. C3 should not be kicked down to players lower then 45 ! This game has turned all the new players into helpless crybabys. Remember the days when Clarity was all you Had?? If you dont then your prob. one of those helpless crybabys who will flame my reply. Reguardless, you have been robbed of the REAL LIFE experience of the game. This in turn makes the noobs showing up for group or raids just a real pain in the ***. I have to deal with enough stupid people out in the real world. NOW even with level restrictions to many of the tards are slipping by the natural selection safety net. Look I have no problem with progress. I have no problem with 'buffing' and 'twinking' when you are an experienced player. I do have problems with GREEDY people who just ***** about level restrictions because it has hurt cash flow. Look how Temperence has exploded for the low lv clerics thanks to the level limits. Amazing how all Greedy high lv clerics RUSH now to get that spell scribed. Monopolizing the market with Aego and Virtue is gone now. Same will happen to a lesser extent now with Clarity. Maybe now a poor lowbie chanter ( think about that statement ) can get a Sow again for a simple cool breeze.

Whine all you want but VI has tipped the scales of balance once again towards the middle.
▲ Page top
RE: Minimum Target Levels
QuoteReply
# Oct 31 2003 at 10:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248944365
Scholar
139 posts
actually, remember the days even before clarity? a la pre-kunark?
▲ Page top
RE: Minimum Target Levels
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2003 at 12:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760992695
View User Forum
8 posts
There are no days before Clarity. Clarity is a lvl 29 enchanter spell and has been in the game since launch. Maybe you are thinking about Clarity 2, which was added with the Kunark expansion?
